concerns.text: T015 mandates an 'atomic synthetic data generation flow' that 'automatically transition[s]' to synthetic generation. This semantically weakens FR-001 and US-1, which require the system to FIRST attempt downloading public datasets and ONLY fallback to synthetic if no linked dataset exists. The task description removes the conditional 'attempt download' logic, effectively hardcoding the fallback path and violating the requirement to prioritize real data.

T019 (Power Analysis) is marked as unchecked [ ]. FR-001/SC-004 explicitly requires a documented power analysis method and report to satisfy statistical power requirements. Leaving this task unimplemented in the task list means the acceptance criterion for SC-004 will not be met in the final deliverable.

T032 (VIF calculation) and T033 (PCA generation) are marked as unchecked [ ]. FR-012 and SC-007 mandate that if VIF ≥ 5, the system MUST perform PCA and use the first principal component. Without these tasks implemented, the conditional logic required by the spec cannot execute, violating the collinearity handling constraint.

T035 (Holm-Bonferroni correction) and T037 (associational framing + threshold justification) are unchecked [ ]. SC-003 requires family-wise error correction, and SC-005 requires explicit justification of the p<0.05 threshold. Omitting these tasks guarantees the final output will fail these success criteria.

T041 (Bootstrap), T042 (Binning), and T043 (Binning results table) are unchecked [ ]. FR-009 and FR-010 explicitly require bootstrap resampling (≥1000 iterations) and sensitivity analysis with binning strategies. These are not optional 'nice-to-haves' but mandatory functional requirements; their absence in the task list is a constraint violation.

T027 (Main execution block) and T028 (Merge logic) are unchecked [ ]. While T026 defines the NaN handling logic, without T027 and T028, the metrics are never computed for the full dataset nor merged with cognitive data. This breaks the data pipeline required by US-2 and US-1, preventing the generation of the final analysis dataset.
